## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Why

Explain the product or technical reason for this PR.

## Scope

- [ ] MVP-aligned change
- [ ] Internal technical improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Release stabilization

## Affected Areas

List the main flows, modules, or platforms affected.

## Validation

List the commands or checks you executed.

Example:

```bash
./gradlew :composeApp:check
./gradlew :composeApp:testDebugUnitTest
```

## Risks

Describe known risks, limitations, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] Target branch is correct for this flow
- [ ] Title follows `<type>: <short summary>`
- [ ] No direct push to protected branches
- [ ] Architecture boundaries remain respected
- [ ] State, errors, and strings were reviewed where relevant
- [ ] Tests were added or existing coverage was reviewed
